features: requestAI(symbol) — user triggers AI oracle on-chain, emits AIRequested event
fulfillAIResult(requestId, action, confidence, reasoning) — backend oracle writes AI result on-chain
getAIResult(requestId) — read AI decision stored on-chain
addTrade(agentName, symbol, action, confidence) — manual AI decision recording
getUserActionCount(address) — how many times a wallet triggered AI

notes: v3 adds full AI oracle pattern: requestAI() → AIRequested event → backend Claude inference → fulfillAIResult() → on-chain result stored
